final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a ByteDance employee ID badge, showing both the front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic studio product photography, clean and corporate, sharp focus throughout
Composition: two badges laid flat side by side on a neutral surface — left badge showing the front face, right badge showing the back face; slight overhead angle, symmetrical framing
Subject: corporate employee ID badge for ByteDance (字节跳动); front side features the ByteDance logo, employee photo placeholder (generic blurred face), employee name, department, and employee ID number; back side features a magnetic stripe, barcode or QR code, company address, and emergency contact instructions
Scene/backdrop: clean light gray or off-white matte surface, minimal shadow beneath each badge
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from above-front, even illumination with subtle soft shadows to convey depth and physicality, no harsh glare on badge surface
Color palette: white badge base with ByteDance brand orange and black typography; lanyard clip in brushed silver metal
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with slight specular highlight, visible printed ink texture, metal clip with brushed finish, subtle embossed or printed logo
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动" on front badge face
Constraints: both badges must be fully visible and legible; badge proportions must match standard CR80 card format (85.6mm × 54mm); photorealistic rendering with no illustration or cartoon style
Avoid: floating badges with no surface, cartoon or flat design, overexposed glare obscuring text, deformed card edges, generic stock-photo badge templates
